title: GMFI net profit soars 556.19% in first half
body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI) recorded net profit growth of 556.19% in the first semester of 2024 from the same period in 2023. This realization reached 65.59% of the net profit in 2023 of US$20.27 million.

title: Lautan Luas to pay off IDR 315 billion bonds next month
body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS), importer and distributor of chemicals for the batik and food industries, will pay off the remaining Shelf Registration Bonds III Phase II 2021 Series A worth IDR 315 billion which will mature on November 12, 2024.

title: NETV announces reverse stock with 2:1 ratio
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) is carrying out a reverse stock merger starting next week, with a ratio of 2:1 or two old nominal shares into a new share.

title: MPPA injects IDR 7.5 billion in capital for neglected subsidiaries
body: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk (MPPA), a retail issuer that operates the Matahari and Hypermart store networks, has distributed additional capital to one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Matahari Super Ekonomi (MSE).

title: Foreign net volume remains stable in green zone, closing at 70.86 million shares
body: Foreign net volume remained consistent in the green zone on Wednesday, October 16, closing at 70.86 million shares, as it had in previous days. The foreign buying volume was 4.61 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 4.54 billion shares. The shares with the highest sales were owned by the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which were sold for up to 2.15 billion shares with a net volume of -597.40 million shares.

title: GMFI net profit soars 556.19% in first half
body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI) recorded net profit growth of 556.19% in the first semester of 2024 from the same period in 2023. This realization reached 65.59% of the net profit in 2023 of US$20.27 million.

body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS), importer and distributor of chemicals for the batik and food industries, will pay off the remaining Shelf Registration Bonds III Phase II 2021 Series A worth IDR 315 billion which will mature on November 12, 2024.

title: NETV announces reverse stock with 2:1 ratio
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) is carrying out a reverse stock merger starting next week, with a ratio of 2:1 or two old nominal shares into a new share.

title: MPPA injects IDR 7.5 billion in capital for neglected subsidiaries
body: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk (MPPA), a retail issuer that operates the Matahari and Hypermart store networks, has distributed additional capital to one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Matahari Super Ekonomi (MSE).

title: Foreign net volume remains stable in green zone, closing at 70.86 million shares
body: Foreign net volume remained consistent in the green zone on Wednesday, October 16, closing at 70.86 million shares, as it had in previous days. The foreign buying volume was 4.61 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 4.54 billion shares. The shares with the highest sales were owned by the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which were sold for up to 2.15 billion shares with a net volume of -597.40 million shares.

title: Weak financial profile, Pefindo confirms Waskita Karya's default status
body: The Indonesian Securities Rating Agency (Pefindo) has confirmed the "idSD" or Selective Default rating for PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), following the company's financial profile which has not improved.

title: FILM signs credit agreement with Bank Mandiri worth IDR 794.75 billion
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM), a film production company, has reportedly signed a loan agreement with PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) with total principal worth IDR 794.75 billion.

title: Bids in today’s SUN auction hit IDR 44.27 trillion
body: Total incoming bids recorded for Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) in the auction on Tuesday (15/10) reportedly reached IDR 44.27 trillion.

title: Foreign share purchases surges, net foreign volume surplus at 497.49 million shares
body: Foreign investors upped their share-buying activities on Monday, October 14, totaling 4.69 billion shares. The digital corporation PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the largest share bought for around 47% of the overall foreign purchase volume, or 2.23 billion shares, with a net volume of 373.02 million shares. The foreign sales volume stood at 4.20 billion shares. The discrepancy between purchasing and selling volumes resulted in a net foreign volume surplus of 497.49 million shares.

title: Bank of Singapore increases ownership in Bank Amar (AMAR) and Buana Finance (BBLD)
body: Bank of Singapore Limited, a foreign investor, acquired 293.77 million shares of PT Bank Amar Indonesia Tbk (AMAR) on Friday, October 11, bringing the total number of shares to 1.90 billion. The purchase of shares via Citibank, N.A. instantly increased the Bank of Singapore's ownership stake in this digital bank from 8.78% to 10.38%. Additionally, with the final share portion of 5.17%, this investor also acquired 123,700 shares of the financing company PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD).

title: Astra’s car sales dropped 15.09% in 9M 2024
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) booked car sales of 357,802 units until the end of September (9M) 2024, dropped 15.09% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Oki Pulp & Paper Mills to issue another IDR and USD bond
body: PT Oki Pulp & Paper Mills (OPPM), a pulp & paper manufacturer of Sinarmas Group, will issue Shelf-Registration Bond Phase IV Year 2024 of IDR 2.25 trillion and Shelf-Registration USD Bond I Phase VI Year 2024 of USD 7.95 million.

title: Foreign buying and selling nearly equal, net volume recorded at 41.01 million shares
body: On Friday (11/10), share purchasing and selling operations made similar results, with the foreign buying volume of 2.31 billion shares and the foreign selling volume of 2.27 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at 41.01 million shares. On the top buy list, foreign investors began by purchasing 144.13 million shares of the mineral mining company PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS), for a net volume of 107.99 million shares.

title: Energi Mega Persada takes over all participating rights in Sengkang Block
body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), Bakrie Group’s oil and gas company, has taken over all participating rights in Sengkang Block.

title: Recently inaugurated, Freeport Indonesia's smelter in KEK Gresik caught in fire
body: The sulphuric acid refinery unit, a part of the smelting facility of PT Freeport Indonesia (PTFI) located in Special Economic Zone (KEK) of Gresik, was reportedly caught in fire yesterday (14/10).

title: BBKP to issue global bond of USD 300 million
body: PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk (BBKP) is planning the issuance of Senior Unsecured Notes (global bond) of a maximum USD 300 million.

title: BNI and Garuda Indonesia Offer Bonuses of up to 25,000 GarudaMiles for Garuda BNI Credit Card Holders
body: To commemorate the 25th anniversary of GarudaMiles, PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI and PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk are providing various attractive offers to Garuda BNI Credit Card users.

title: IBST secures IDR 600 billion loan from Bank Permata
body: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk (IBST) has obtained a loan facility of IDR 600 billion from dari PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI).

title: JCI shifts positively throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) saw positive trend throughout the session today (14/10).

title: IBRD, the most generous creditor of Indonesia’s foreign debt
body: Indonesia’s foreign debts from international organisation were reported totalling USD 46.07 billion, equal to 10.84% of total foreign debts of USD 425.05 billion as of August 2024.

title: Transcoal Pacific’s subsidiary to divest vessel for IDR 6 billion
body: PT Energy Transporter Indonesia (ETI), a subsidiary of PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI), has divested one of its barges, ETI 800.

title: Total funds in BPR reached IDR 167.1 trillion in H1 2024
body: Total users’ funds in People’s Economic Bank (BPR) until the first half (H1) of 2024 reportedly reached IDR 167.1 trillion, up 6.1% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 157.42 trillion seen in the same period in 2023.

title: Sekar Laut (SKLT) welcomes four new investors, each with a 6.54% stake
body: PT Sekar Laut Tbk (SKLT), a food and beverage manufacturer best known for its Finna brand, welcomed four new investors on Thursday, October 10. The four investors purchased 451.82 million SKLT shares, or 6.54% of the total, through PT Henan Putihrai Sekuritas. The four investors are PT Sentra Dinamika Persada, PT Eswhuang, PT Visi Inti Pelangi, and PT Aneka Agro Food. In the meantime, Sekar Laut released 17,500 of its own shares via PT BNI Sekuritas, giving it a 9.83% final ownership position.

title: Opening the week, BREN shows sharpest upturn amidst jumbo market cap issuers
body: Stock price of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) soared 3.85% to IDR 6,750 per share at 10.13 AM WIB from IDR 6,500 seen at 9 AM WIB today (14/10).

title: PasarPolis and Gojek collaborate to expand insurance services in Indonesia
body: PasarPolis and Gojek are announcing the latest collaboration in order to extend the reach of insurance services for Indonesian people.

title: A year after IPO, STRK saw 50% decline
body: Stock performance of PT Lovina Beach Brewery Tbk (STRK), a company engaged in consumer goods’ sector, plummeted 50% a year after its debut in the stock exchange on October 10, 2023.

title: Jaya Real Property realises 75% of capex this year
body: PT Jaya Real Property Tbk (JRPT), a property developer, has realised 75% of tis capital expenditure (capex) set for the fiscal year (FY) 2024.

title: Habco Trans Maritima to expand its fleet, acquiring carrier for USD 18 million
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM), a company engaged in the logistics and shipping services, has acquired a new bulk carrier vessel for USD 13.8 million or IDR 226.6 billion.

title: Share sale transactions greater, net foreign volume closed at -591.74 million shares
body: On Thursday, October 10, share sales transactions generated a foreign sales volume of 3.53 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was in the range of 2.94 billion shares, and net foreign volume closed at -591.74 million shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares sold, totalling approximately 706.10 million shares, with a net volume of -132.62 million shares.

title: EMTEK buys over 10% of Bukalapak.com (BUKA) shares
body: On Wednesday, October 9, PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk, or EMTEK, purchased 10.36% of the shares of PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA). The media company became a new investor by purchasing 10.68 billion BUKA shares through PT Sucor Sekuritas and two additional securities. Bukalapak.com, in itself, is one of the most popular online shopping portals in Indonesia.

title: Profit soars in first half, JPFA distributes interim dividend of IDR 813.93 billion
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA) distributed an interim dividend of IDR 813.93 billion or IDR 70 per share from net profit for the first semester of 2024.

title: GGRP to lower shares nominal value to IDR 140
body: PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk (GGRP) will cut its shares’ nomimal value to IDR 140 from IDR 500, effective starting from November 5, 2024.

title: Gov’t to auction 7 series of SUN, eyeing IDR 22 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Tuesday (15/10) with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: Another debut, Daaz Bara Lestari to issue 300 million shares in IPO
body: PT Daaz Bara Lestari Tbk (DAAZ), a commodity trading company that has now expanded its reach to mining logistics and services, will issue 300 million shares in its initial public offering (IPO).

title: PNM to issue medium-term notes worth IDR 262 billion
body: PT Permodalan Nasional Madani (PNM), a non-bank financing institution under ultra-micro holding of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), issues medium term sukuk mudharabah of IDR 262 billion.
